member.name: T:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5
member.summary: Contains common static methods.

remarks.para: The LJCNetCommon class contains static methods for all .NET program types.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.CheckArgument``1(``0)
member.summary: Check for missing argument of type: string with no value, null, integer = 0, IList with no items, decimal = 0 or DataTable with no rows.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.CompareNull(System.Object,System.Object)
member.summary: Compare null values.
member.returns: The integer that indicates the order relationship of the objects.
member.remarks:
-2 - Neither object is null.
-1 - Null object x precedes object y.
0 - Object x and object y are both null.
1 - Object x follows null object y.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.HasColumns(System.Data.DataColumnCollection)
member.summary: Checks a DataColumns collection for items.
member.returns: true if the collection has items; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.HasColumns(System.Data.DataTable)
member.summary: Checks a data table for columns definitions.
member.returns: true if the data table contains Columns; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.HasData(System.Data.DataTable)
member.summary: Checks a data table for rows.
member.returns: true if a data table and it contains rows; otherwise, false.
member.remarks: This allows a single if statement where the DataTable value may be null.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.HasElements(System.Object)
member.summary: Checks an array for elements.
member.returns: true if an array and it has elements.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.HasItems(System.Collections.IList)
member.summary: Checks an IList collection for items.
member.returns: true if the collection contains items; otherwise; false.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.HasTables(System.Data.DataSet)
member.summary: Checks a DataSet for tables.
member.returns: true if the DataSet has tables; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.HasValue(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a text value exists.
member.returns: true if the text has a value; otherwise false.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.IsEqual(System.Object,System.Object)
member.summary: Checks if two values are equal.
member.remarks: Performs a strongly-typed value check of two objects where those objects are built-in system types.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.IsDbMinDate(System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Checks for DB Minimum date or less.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.Base64BytesToText(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Decodes a Base64 byte array to a Text value.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.TextToBase64Bytes(System.String)
member.summary: Encodes a Text value to a Base64 byte array.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.Base64BytesToTextBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Decodes a Base64 byte array to a Text byte array.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.TextBytesToBase64Bytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Encodes a byte array to a Base64 byte array.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.Base64ToText(System.String)
member.summary: Decodes a Base64 value to a Text value.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.TextToBase64(System.String)
member.summary: Encodes a Text value to a Base64 value.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.Base64ToTextBytes(System.String)
member.summary: Decodes a Base64 value to a Text byte array.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.TextBytesToBase64(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Encodes a Text byte array to a Base64 value.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.BytesToText(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Creates text from a byte array.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.TextToBytes(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a byte array from text.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.MemStreamToBytes(System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Copies a memory stream to a byte array.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.BytesToMemStream(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Copies a byte array to a memory stream.
member.returns: The reference to the memory stream.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.MemStreamToString(System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Creates a string from a memory stream.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.StringToMemStream(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a memory stream from a string.
member.returns: The reference to the memory stream.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.XmlDecode(System.String)
member.summary: Decodes an encoded XML string.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.XmlEncode(System.String)
member.summary: Encodes a string with XML escape values.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.XmlDeserialize(System.Type,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Deserialize an XML message file to an object.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.XmlDeserializeMessage(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Deserialize an XML message string to an object.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.XmlSerialize(System.Type,System.Object,System.Xml.Serialization.XmlSerializerNamespaces,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Serialize an object to an XML message file.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.XmlSerializeToString(System.Type,System.Object,System.Xml.Serialization.XmlSerializerNamespaces)
member.summary: Serialize an object to an XML message string.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.ConfigBool(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves the Config bool value. (RE)

remarks.para: This uses the program config file which is the name of the program plus the extension ".config".

// An example config file.
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<configuration>
<appSettings>
<add key="LocalDbDataAccess" value="true" />
</appSettings>
</configuration>

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.ConfigColor(System.String,System.Drawing.Color@)
member.summary: Retrieves the Config Color value. (RE)

remarks.para: This uses the program config file which is the name of the program plus the extension ".config".

// An example config file.
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<configuration>
<appSettings>
<add key="BeginColor" value="AliceBlue" />
</appSettings>
</configuration>

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.ConfigString(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves the Config string value. (RE)

remarks.para: This uses the program config file which is the name of the program plus the extension ".config".

// An example config file.
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<configuration>
<appSettings>
<add key="ConnectionType" value="MySql" />
</appSettings>
</configuration>

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.ConsoleConfig(System.String)
member.summary: Accept or Select the DataConfig.
Accept or Select the DataConfig.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.GetBoolean(System.Object)
member.summary: Gets a boolean value from an object.
member.returns: The boolean value or false if the object is null. Also returns false if the object is not type "bool".

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.GetByte(System.Object)
member.summary: Gets a byte value from an object.
member.returns: The byte value or the byte default if the object is null. Also returns false if the object is not type "byte".

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.GetChar(System.Object)
member.summary: Gets a byte value from an object.
member.returns: The char value or the char default if the object is null. Also returns false if the object is not type "char".

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.GetDateTime(System.Object)
member.summary: Gets a DateTime value from an object.
member.returns: The DateTime value or null if the object is null. Also returns null if the object is not type "DateTime".

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.GetDecimal(System.Object)
member.summary: Gets a decimal value from an object. (E)
member.returns: The decimal value or zero if the object is null. Also returns zero if the object is not type "decimal", "long", "int" or "short".

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.GetDouble(System.Object)
member.summary: Gets a double value from an object.
member.returns: The double value or zero if the object is null. Also returns zero if the object is not type "double", "decimal", "long" , "int" or "short".

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.GetInt16(System.Object)
member.summary: Gets a short value from an object.
member.returns: The long value or zero if the object is null. Also returns zero if the object is not type "short".

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.GetInt32(System.Object)
member.summary: Gets an integer value from an object.
member.returns: The integer value or zero if the object is null. Also returns zero if the object is not type "int" or "short".

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.GetInt64(System.Object)
member.summary: Gets a long value from an object. (E)
member.returns: The long value or zero if the object is null. Also returns zero if the object is not type "long", "int" or "short".

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.GetObject(System.Object)
member.summary: Gets an instantiated object value.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.GetSingle(System.Object)
member.summary: Gets a float value from an object.
member.returns: The single value or zero if the object is null. Also returns zero if the object is not type "single", "long", "int" or "short".

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.GetString(System.Object)
member.summary: Gets a trimmed string value from an object. (E)
member.returns: The trimmed string value or null if the object is null.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.ToInt16(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a short from a text string.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.ToInt32(System.String)
member.summary: Gets an int from a text string.

member.name: F:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.TypeBoolean
member.summary: The Boolean type name.

member.name: F:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.TypeByte
member.summary: The Byte type name.

member.name: F:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.TypeChar
member.summary: The Char type name.

member.name: F:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.TypeDateTime
member.summary: The DateTime type name.

member.name: F:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.TypeDecimal
member.summary: Type Decimal type name.

member.name: F:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.TypeDouble
member.summary: The Double type name.

member.name: F:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.TypeInt16
member.summary: The Int16 type name.

member.name: F:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.TypeInt32
member.summary: The Int32 type name.

member.name: F:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.TypeInt64
member.summary: The Int64 type name.

member.name: F:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.TypeSingle
member.summary: The Single type name.

member.name: F:LJCNetCommon5.LJC5.TypeString
member.summary: The String type name.

member.name: T:LJCNetCommon5.LJCNetString5
member.summary: Contains common string related static methods.

remarks.para: The NetCommon class contains string related static helper functions for all .NET program types.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCNetString5.IsDigits(System.String)
member.summary: Checks a string value for digits.
member.returns: true if all digits; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCNetString5.IsEqual(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Do an Ignore Case string compare.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCNetString5.AddDelimitedValue(System.String@,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a value to a comma delimited string.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCNetString5.DelimitValues(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds delimiters to one or more values.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCNetString5.ExceptionString(System.Exception)
member.summary: Creates an exception string with outer and inner exception.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCNetString5.FormatValue(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Formats the column value for the SQL string.

remarks.para: Returns the string formatted value from the Value property based on the DataTypeName property.

If the DataType is Boolean, returns "1" or "0".
If the DataType is DateTime, returns a string Date or Minimum Date value.
If the DataType is string, returns a string with doubled single quotes.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCNetString5.GetPropertyName(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a column name with underscores converted to Pascal case.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCNetString5.GetSearchName(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the Search Property name.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCNetString5.InitString(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a string to the trimmed value or null.
member.returns: The trimmed string value or null if the string is null or an empty string when trimmed.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCNetString5.ScrubDelimitedValues(System.String)
member.summary: Scrubs extra blanks from the comma delimited string.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCNetString5.Split(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Split a string on a single separator without empty entries.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCNetString5.Split(System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Split a string on multiple separators without empty entries.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCNetString5.Truncate(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Truncates a text string to the specified length.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCNetString5.CreateLSoundex(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a letter based soundex value.
member.remarks:
Scatter = SCTR
Aphrodisiac = APHRDSC
Pharmacy = PHRMC
Psychology = PSCHLG
Cart = CRT
Ceiling = CLNG
Cyan = CN

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCNetString5.CreatePSoundex(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a Phonetic based soundex value. (D)
member.remarks:
Scatter = SCTR
Aphrodisiac = AFRDSC
Pharmacy = FRMS
Psychology = SCHLG
Cart = KRT
Ceiling = SLNG
Cyan = SN

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCNetString5.Soundex(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a US Census Soundex value.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCNetString5.IsSoundexLetter(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Checks if the letter is a soundex skipped letter.
member.returns: true if the letter should be skipped; otherwise, false.
member.remarks: True if the letter is the first letter or not a vowel and not the same as the previous letter.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCNetString5.Phonetic(System.String,System.Int32@,System.Nullable{System.Char}@)
member.summary: Creates a Phonetic character from the supplied text starting at the supplied index.
member.returns: true if a Phonetic was created; otherwise, false.

remarks.para:
Sets the letter parameter to:
- "F" if the current and following letter are "PH"
- "S" if the current letter is "P", the following letter is "S" and the third letter is a vowel or "Y".
- "K" if the current letter is "C" and the following letter is "A", "O" or "U".
- "S" if the current letter is "C" and the following letter is "E", "I" or "Y".
- Otherwise, the same letter as at the current index.
Advances index to the next available char.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCNetString5.AddObjectArgError(System.String@,System.Object,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds the missing argument name to the message.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCNetString5.ThrowArgError(System.String)
member.summary: Throws the invalid argument exception if message has a value.

member.name: F:LJCNetCommon5.LJCNetString5.CompareEqual
member.summary: The compare object is equal to the compareto object.

member.name: F:LJCNetCommon5.LJCNetString5.CompareGreater
member.summary: The compare object is greater than the compareto object.

member.name: F:LJCNetCommon5.LJCNetString5.CompareLess
member.summary: The compare object is less than the compareto object.

member.name: F:LJCNetCommon5.LJCNetString5.CompareNotNullOrEqual
member.summary: The compare object is notnull or equal is equal to the compareto object.

member.name: T:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTestCommon5
member.summary: Provides test methods.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTestCommon5.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes an object instance.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTestCommon5.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes an object instance with the supplied values.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTestCommon5.Write(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Writes a compare message to the console.
member.param: Indicates if the values should be bracketed.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTestCommon5.CompareMessage(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a compare message if the result value does not equal the compare value.
member.param: Indicates if the values should be bracketed.

member.name: T:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextBuilder5
member.summary: Provides methods for creating text.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextBuilder5.#ctor(LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextState5)
member.summary: Initializes an object instance with the provided values.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextBuilder5.Clear
member.summary: Clears the Builder text.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextBuilder5.ToString
member.summary: Retrieves the object text.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextBuilder5.AddIndent(System.Int32)
member.summary: Changes the IndentCount by the provided value.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextBuilder5.AddLine(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a text line without modification.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextBuilder5.AddText(System.String)
member.summary: Adds text without modification.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextBuilder5.Item(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds a delimiter if not the first list item.
member.param: Indicates if the indent should be added.
Indicates if a prefixed newline should be added.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextBuilder5.Line(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds a modified text line to the builder.
member.param: Indicates if the indent should be added.
Indicates if a prefixed newline should be added.
member.returns: The added, potentially modified text line.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextBuilder5.Text(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds modified text to the builder.
member.param: Indicates if the indent should be added.
Indicates if a prefixed newline should be added.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextBuilder5.EndsWithNewLine
member.summary: Indicates if the builder text ends with a newline.
member.returns: true if the current value ends with a newline; otherwise false.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextBuilder5.StartWithNewLine(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Allow text to start with a newline.
member.param: Indicates if a new line is allowed.
member.returns: true if the text should start with a newline; otherwise false.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextBuilder5.GetDelimited(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a delimiter if not the first list item.
member.returns: The text value with the potentially added delimiter.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextBuilder5.GetIndented(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a new potentially indented line.
member.returns: The text value with the potentially added indent.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextBuilder5.GetIndentString
member.summary: Returns the current indent string.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextBuilder5.GetLine(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets a modified text line.
member.param: Indicates if the indent should be added.
Indicates if a prefixed newline should be added.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextBuilder5.GetText(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets potentially indented and wrapped text.
member.param: Indicates if the indent should be added.
Indicates if a prefixed newline should be added.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextBuilder5.GetWrapped(System.String)
member.summary: Gets added text and new wrapped line if combined line > LineLimit.

member.name: P:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextBuilder5.Builder
member.summary: The internal StringBuilder class.

member.summary: The debug text.

member.summary: Gets or sets the delimiter.

member.summary: Gets a value indicating if the builder has text.

member.name: P:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextBuilder5.IndentCharCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the indent character count.

member.name: P:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextBuilder5.IndentCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the indent count.

member.name: P:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextBuilder5.IndentLength
member.summary: Gets the current indent length.

member.name: P:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextBuilder5.IsFirst
member.summary: Gets or sets the first item indicator.

member.name: P:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextBuilder5.LineLength
member.summary: Gets the current length.

member.name: P:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextBuilder5.LineLimit
member.summary: Gets the character limit.

member.name: P:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextBuilder5.WrapAtDelimiter
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that indicates if a wrap should occur at a leading delimiter.

member.name: P:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextBuilder5.WrapEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that indicates if line wrapping is enabled.

member.name: P:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextBuilder5.WrapPrefix
member.summary: Gets or sets the new line prefix.

member.summary: Contains parsing related methods.

member.summary: Initializes an object instance.

member.summary: Retrieves a delimited string.

member.summary: Retrieves a string including the supplied delimiters.
member.returns: The delimited text including the delimiters.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextParser5.FindTag(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Finds the first tag in a text value.

member.name: M:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextParser5.RemoveSection(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Removes a section from a text value.
member.returns: The text with the section removed.

member.summary: Removes tags from a text value.
member.returns: The text with the tags removed.

member.summary: The delimited string begin index.

member.summary: The delimited string end index.

member.summary: Represents the text state.

member.summary: Initializes an object instance with the supplied values.

member.name: P:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextState5.IndentCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the current indent count to sync called method.

member.name: P:LJCNetCommon5.LJCTextState5.ChildIndentCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the new indent count to sync calling method.
